mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review( productSeq, userId, userName, score, contents, imageUrl ) VALUES( #{productSeq}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{score}, #{contents}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.reviewSeq, A.productSeq, A.userId, A.userName, A.score, A.contents, A.imageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(A.createdAt,'%Y-%d-%H'), B.productName FROM review A INNER JOIN product B ON A.productSeq = B.productSeq WHERE A.productSeq = #{productSeq} ORDER BY A.createdAt DESC;
